case_title: VANG, QUANG et al vs. JOHN DOE et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-25-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-25-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR AUG-24-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VANG, QUANG TRAN, KIM NGUYEN, HAI LUONG, DIEM

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-28-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-28-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR PLAINTIFF: AS TO WHY THERE THERE HAS BEEN NO COMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 301C, RE: COURT ORDER DESIGNATING CASE AS AN UNINSURED MOTORIST. COURT WILL DISMISS CASE IF THERE IS A FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM FEB-28-1996 TO MAR-29-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-29-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-29-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 301C. HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VANG, QUANG TRAN, KIM NGUYEN, HAI LUONG, DIEM AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN DOE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-25-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-26-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-05-1995
OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-24-1995, CONTINUED TO JAN-29-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS REPORT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
